column11: Estimated percentage change in surrounding property values attributable to the project. Captures expected appreciation pressure due to increased density, transit proximity, or area activation.
Relative financial stress indicator associated with the project. Higher values indicate greater perceived project-level risk.
Measure of how much capital exposure this single project represents. Larger, higher-cost developments produce higher concentration risk.
Indicator of how feasible the project may be from a construction lending perspective.
Relative estimate of potential change in insurance costs due to project characteristics.
